metadata.title: Doh Atu – Together for Myanmar
metadata.description: Association promoting peace, human rights, and democracy in Myanmar through culture, art, literature, and craftsmanship.

hero.subtitle: Promoting peace, human rights, and democracy in Myanmar through culture, art, literature, and craftsmanship

awareness.description: Informing about the situation in Myanmar and carrying the voice of the Burmese people to the French and international community

advocacy.description: Promoting peace, human rights, and democracy in Myanmar and around the world

cta.title: Join the movement for Myanmar's future

support.title: Support Our Work
support.why_description: Your support enables us to continue raising awareness, organizing cultural events, and carrying the voice of the Burmese people in France and Europe.
support.membership_description: Join Doh Atu for 30€ per year and become part of our committed community.
support.donate_description: Every contribution helps fund our awareness campaigns and cultural events.
support.volunteer_description: Join our volunteer team to organize events, translate documents, or raise awareness in your community.

about.title: About Us
about.myanmar_title: Myanmar and Its Fight for Democracy
about.myanmar_intro: Myanmar is located in Southeast Asia with an area of over 675,000 km² and 55 million inhabitants. Since independence in 1948, the country has known only successive military coups.
about.coup_description: On February 1, 2021, the third military coup took place — the bloodiest in Myanmar's history. The Burmese people massively rejected military interference, giving birth to the Civil Disobedience Movement (CDM).
about.crisis_description: Over 3 million people displaced internally, half of them children. More than 15.8 million people are in urgent need of humanitarian assistance.
about.resistance_description: Despite repression, the resistance of the Burmese people is gaining ground. The creativity of ultra-connected generations and the determination of the people are weakening the military regime.

news.title: News
news.stay_tuned: Follow us on social media to stay informed.

earthquake.title: Myanmar Earthquake: Our Response
earthquake.description: On March 28, 2025, a 7.7 magnitude earthquake struck central Myanmar near Mandalay, killing over 3,500 people and affecting 17.2 million. In Mandalay, 80% of buildings collapsed.
earthquake.response: Doh Atu immediately mobilized to raise funds and deliver aid to affected communities. Thanks to the generosity of our donors, we contributed to the humanitarian relief effort for earthquake victims.
